titleStmt.title: SII 5.761: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 761. (A.R. No. 197 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamaśtu . śakābdam 1000 4 100 2 10 1 lmel cellāniṉṟa svasti śrīkojaṭilavarmmarāna tribhu vanaccakra vattikaḷ kāttikai nāḷ piṟanta parākkiramapāṇṭiyatevar
Āṉa kulacekartevar nam yāṇṭu Irupatāvatu viriccikanāyaṟṟu patiṉiñcān tiyatiyum pūrva(va)pakṣattu dvādaśi yum bṛhaspati vāramu m peṟṟa
repati nāḷ Ātr(o)yagotrattu podhāyanasū tra ttu śrīkailāsamuṭaiyāṉ kulacekarapaṭṭaṉukku taṉakku kāṇiyāṭcaiyāka tanta teṉārināṭṭuc cittiraṉati yuttaratīra ttu
dakṣa ṇakāci Uṭaiyār viśva nātaṉ kovilukku Iraṇṭām paṅku nampu tevakaṉmamum Āka muṉṉāḷ niṉṟa pervāci viśva nātapaṭṭaṉ cāperā yivaṉukku(ka) ñātiyu millāmal tu
ramum muṭṭu varukaiyil yinta paṅkil nampil Oṉṟu pātiyum tevakaṉmattil Oṉṟu pātiyum nāḷ 9 tilukku tāṉ kāṇiyāṭcaiākak kaiyāṇṭu Ikkoyilil Acaṟpaṅkil nampum
tevakarmattukkum Aṟṟa mari Āti prasādamum Uṭaimaiyum Iṟaiyiliyum maṉaiyum(t) toṭṭamum toṭṭakkūṟum maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa cuvatrā ṅkaḷil Oṉṟu pātiyum(p) paṟṟi Ivvakaippaṭi
ye nayiṉār caṇḍeśvara śāśa ṉamum vāṅki san=tadipraveśame candrāditya vaṟ cellak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kāṇiāṭcaiākak kaiyāṇṭu koḷḷumpaṭi kaṟ pittu viṭṭa Aḷavukku .
Digital edition of SII 5.761 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
